title: Fancy Beacon
description: Shiny, new beacon with renovated model!
body:
## About

Fancy Beacon is a pack that renovate the texture of the beacon. It includes revamped model, which changes the shape of the beacon to a cube, adds custom glass texture and custom obsidian base texture.

## Quick Preview
![Beacon with updated textures and model](https://i.imgur.com/5jxWzMh.png)
